title: Fresh Folded Thai Shrimp Skewers
description: A flavorful and umami-rich dish featuring shrimp paste and kapi, perfect for a date night, served on a bamboo tray with a Mediterranean twist
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a blender or food processor, combine shrimp paste, kapi, fish sauce, lime juice, and brown sugar, and blend until smooth
Add garlic and lemon grass to the blender and blend until well combined
Thread shrimp onto bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp
Brush the shrimp with the shrimp paste mixture, making sure they are fully coated
Grill the shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and fully cooked
Serve the shrimp skewers on a bamboo tray, garnished with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice
Fold the sides of the bamboo tray over the skewers to create a shaggy, rustic presentation
